pages.title: api
pages.content: Groundhog Day API — GROUNDHOG DAY Skip to main content Groundhog - D a y.com The leading Groundhog Day data source Menu Groundhogs Map Predictions About Contact GROUNDHOG-DAY.com Groundhogs Map Predictions About Contact Home Groundhog Day API The GROUNDHOG-DAY.com API returns all of North America's prognosticating animals and their yearly weather predictions. Our innovative LLM (Largely Luck-based Marmot) model is trained on over 130 years of data, and can be used to make inferences about whether spring will come early or not. It’s the critical infrastructure you need for your next multi-billion-dollar business venture. 🦫 https://groundhog-day.com/api/v1/ 🦫 Use the API to: Get all groundhogs (and predictions) Get 1 groundhog (and predictions) Get all predictions for a given year That should be enough to get you started, but there’s an OpenAPI schema available if you need enterprise-level documentation before rolling out your GaaP (Groundhogs as a Platform) strategy. Getting data There are 3 endpoints. All are GET requests. /api/v1/groundhogs /api/v1/groundhogs/{slug} /api/v1/predictions?year={year} Adding/modifying data Updating the data is possible, but not through the API. If you want to add a new weather-predicting animal or update one, head over to add a groundhog . Contact Back to top
